errors.message: adjustInventoryUsecase writes base transactional table inventory_ledger_entry but does not update any related metric table (expected operations_metrics).
requestWalkInSlotsUsecase is a read-only suggestion command but declares writes to availability_slot and operations_metrics.

questions: Should adjustInventoryUsecase update operations_metrics when writing inventory_ledger_entry?
Should requestWalkInSlotsUsecase be read-only and remove writes to availability_slot and operations_metrics?
trace: Verified all user actions map to a usecase by usecaseId.
Checked base transactional table writes against metric table updates.
Identified adjustInventoryUsecase writes inventory_ledger_entry without updating any metric table.
Identified requestWalkInSlotsUsecase incorrectly declares writes to availability_slot and operations_metrics despite being a suggestion command.
